emails.subject: Lunch
emails.body: Lunch Jim, Hope all is well with you. I was wondering when would be a good time to get on your busy schedule to do lunch. I just wanted to touch base and let you know some of the projects I've been working on since I left your group. Anytime the rest of this week is good for me and next week (save Monday). Damon Harvey Enron Global Markets 713-345-7645

emails.subject: RE: Lunch
emails.body: RE: Lunch Damon Good idea. I'm out early next week. How about next Thursday? Jim To: Steffes, James D.

emails.subject: RE: Lunch
emails.body: Great! I'll call you Thursday morning to firm up a time. Damon Harvey Enron Global Markets 713-345-7645 To: Harvey, Damon
